title: LLVM
description: LLVM documents overview material for LLVM in the language domain. It is classified as an entity page for the toolchain class, so readers can understand its topic, scope, and place in the wiki taxonomy. The page highlights Terms, LLVM Core, Clang, LLDB, and LLD, with examples, commands, diagrams, or references kept close to the relevant explanation. Important search terms include c++, language, and cpp, helping both humans and generated indexes connect this page with adjacent concepts. The route is language / cpp / llvm / overview, and the frontmatter keeps the canonical subject, ontology role, and navigation context aligned with repository validation. Use it for quick orientation, implementation reminders, and deeper research.
